quotes.quote_text: “ Mrs. Bennet , have you no more lanes hereabouts in which Lizzy may lose her way again to - day ? ”

context.quote_text: “ if that disagreeable Mr. Darcy is not coming here again with our dear Bingley ! What can he mean by being so tiresome as to be always coming here ? I had no notion but he would go a - shooting , or something or other , and not disturb us with his company . What shall we do with him ? Lizzy , you must walk out with him again , that he may not be in Bingley ’s way . ”
“ I advise Mr. Darcy , and Lizzy , and Kitty , ”
“ to walk to Oakham Mount this morning . It is a nice long walk , and Mr. Darcy has never seen the view . ”
